black soil.notes: Holds moisture well but can become sticky in heavy rain. Good drainage planning is important.

red soil.notes: Usually needs organic matter and careful moisture management.

loamy soil.notes: Balanced soil for many crops. Maintain organic carbon with compost or farmyard manure.

clay soil.notes: Holds water well but may need drainage before harvest or root-sensitive stages.

sandy loam soil.notes: Drains quickly, so use frequent light irrigation and add organic matter.
